elements.description: หมวดงานระบบประปาภายในอาคาร

warnings: This sheet lists only section/subsection header rows (4, 4.1-4.4) with 'รวม' (subtotal) placeholders and no itemized line items visible at this resolution/crop -- consistent with this being a category rollup sheet rather than a detailed item ledger. Item descriptions for 4.2-4.4 are LOW CONFIDENCE transcriptions of small rotated text and should be re-verified against a higher-resolution source.
All quantity/price columns are blank on this sheet (template, not a filled ledger), matching the pattern seen on the sibling sheet 17/23 (_หน้า75_1_electrical_boq.json).
